description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 11, 2025 at 4:41 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Venice Boulevard near National Boulevard.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northeast bound on Venice Boulevard in the middle of three lanes when a passenger car in the rightmost lane 
and in front of the Waymo AV began to change lanes to the middle lane. The test driver of the Waymo AV transitioned to manual mode, 
and began to change lanes into the leftmost lane to avoid the passenger car ahead. During this lane change maneuver, the rear driver side of 
the Waymo AV made contact with the front passenger side of an SUV that was traveling in the leftmost lane, positioned slightly behind the 
Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in 
manual mode. The SUV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
